entity: Paul George IND 2011-17 should be #24 (regression: currently shows #8 for 2011-14)
notes: BBR confirms Paul George wore #24 for his entire Pacers career (2010-2017). The current data shows #8 for the 2011-2014 stint — a gap-and-islands grouping bug. George did not wear #13 in Indiana until later (and not in his early Pacers years).
